run.commit_message:
When close_asap flag is set, set bytes read to 0

In the readToQueryBuf, the c->nread represents the number of bytes read. When close_asap flag is set, there is a bug where the c->nread isn't reset to 0 and this breaks the invariant. IOThreads then incorrectly think there is data to read and results in a crash. This change fixes this bug.

Signed-off-by: Deepak Nandihalli <deepak.nandihalli@gmail.com>

commits_since_prev.author: Deepak Nandihalli
